sign_in.title: Shipper Portal
sign_in.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
sign_in.terms_prefix: I have read and accept the

brand.quote: "The most reliable freight partner for your business growth."

terms_dialog.title: WeTruck Platform – Terms & Conditions
terms_dialog.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the platform.
terms_dialog.section_1_content: By clicking "I Accept", you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the following responsibilities as a Transporter (Multimodal Transport Operator) or Freight Forwarder (acting as Shipper/Consignor) on the WeTruck Platform. These terms align with Ethiopian laws, including the Multimodal Transport Proclamation No. 548/2007, which governs international multimodal transport contracts, liabilities, and exemptions.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.success: OTP has been sent to your email. Redirecting…

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.otp_placeholder: Enter the code sent to your email
reset_password.otp_hint: Check your inbox and spam folder.
reset_password.success: Password reset successful. Redirecting to sign in…

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.subtitle: Enter your current password and choose a new password.
change_password.password_hint: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

errors.captcha_load_failed: Unable to load security code. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.captcha_incorrect: The security code you entered is incorrect. Please enter the code from the new image below.
errors.network_error: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.invalid_credentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.account_not_found: No account found with this email address. Please check your email or contact support.
errors.account_disabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support for assistance.
errors.server_error: A server error occurred. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.too_many_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again. If the problem persists, contact support.
errors.auth_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.validation_error: Validation error. Please check your input.
